proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `age_years` is associated with longer mean `pfs_months` after adjustment for clinical features, biomarkers, treatments, labs, and metastatic sites.

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + receptor/biomarker variables + key labs + treatments + comorbidities + metastatic sites; coefficient extracted for age_years.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0 after adjustment.

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + receptor/biomarker variables + key labs + treatments + comorbidities + metastatic sites; coefficient extracted for stage_iv.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients without `pik3ca_mutation` after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `brca1_mutation` or `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` after adjustment.

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + receptor/biomarker variables + key labs + treatments + comorbidities + metastatic sites; coefficient extracted for brca1_mutation.

Core multivariable OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + receptor/biomarker variables + key labs + treatments + comorbidities + metastatic sites; coefficient extracted for brca2_mutation.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_palbociclib` have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving palbociclib after adjustment.

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + receptor/biomarker variables + key labs + treatments + comorbidities + metastatic sites; coefficient extracted for treatment_palbociclib.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is larger in `er_positive` and `pr_positive` patients than in marker-negative patients.

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS plus interaction term treatment_palbociclib:er_positive; coefficient is additional pfs_months associated with the treatment in the modifier-positive subgroup beyond main effects.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_palbociclib` by `er_positive`: interaction coefficient 1.559293 months (SE 0.022217, z=70.19, p=1e-300). Unadjusted treatment difference was -0.017 months in ER-negative patients versus +1.577 months in ER-positive patients.

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS plus interaction term treatment_palbociclib:pr_positive; coefficient is additional pfs_months associated with the treatment in the modifier-positive subgroup beyond main effects.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_palbociclib` by `pr_positive`: interaction coefficient 1.028683 months (SE 0.021769, z=47.25, p=1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients without `pik3ca_mutation`.

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS plus interaction term treatment_palbociclib:pik3ca_mutation; coefficient is additional pfs_months associated with the treatment in the modifier-positive subgroup beyond main effects.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_palbociclib` by `pik3ca_mutation`: interaction coefficient -1.665311 months (SE 0.021173, z=-78.65, p=1e-300). Unadjusted treatment difference was +1.659 months in PIK3CA-wildtype patients versus +0.036 months in PIK3CA-mutant patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with high `ki67_pct` (top quartile) than in patients with lower `ki67_pct`.

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS plus interaction term treatment_palbociclib:high_ki67; coefficient is additional pfs_months associated with the treatment in the modifier-positive subgroup beyond main effects.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_palbociclib` by high `ki67_pct`: interaction coefficient -1.339461 months (SE 0.021478, z=-62.36, p=1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_tamoxifen` is associated with longer `pfs_months`, especially among patients with `er_positive` equal to 1.

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS: pfs_months ~ age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + node_positive + postmenopausal + receptor/biomarker variables + key labs + treatments + comorbidities + metastatic sites; coefficient extracted for treatment_tamoxifen.
Core multivariable OLS plus interaction term treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive; coefficient is additional pfs_months associated with the treatment in the modifier-positive subgroup beyond main effects.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_tamoxifen` by `er_positive`: interaction coefficient 0.030239 months (SE 0.024215, z=1.25, p=0.21175310453517904).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_trastuzumab` is associated with longer `pfs_months` in patients with `her2_positive` or `her2_amplification` equal to 1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_olaparib` is associated with longer `pfs_months` in patients with `brca1_mutation` or `brca2_mutation` equal to 1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` is associated with longer `pfs_months`, with a larger association in triple-negative disease or `her2_low` disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_pembrolizumab` is associated with longer `pfs_months`, especially in triple-negative disease and in patients without inflammatory or autoimmune markers.

analyses.result_summary: `treatment_pembrolizumab` by triple-negative status: interaction coefficient -0.083339 months (SE 0.034077, z=-2.45, p=0.014460087187099901).

analyses.code: Core multivariable OLS plus interaction term treatment_pembrolizumab:high_nlr; coefficient is additional pfs_months associated with the treatment in the modifier-positive subgroup beyond main effects.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cancer burden features `node_positive` and larger `tumor_size_cm` are associated with lower mean `pfs_months` after adjustment.
